Lore Item Quest Item
EXPENDABLE Charges: 1
Effect: Gate (Any Slot, Casting Time: Instant) as Level 10
WT: 0.1 Size: TINY
Class: ALL
Race: ALL
Vial of Swirling Smoke
Lore Item Quest Item
EXPENDABLE Charges: 1
Effect: Gate (Any Slot, Casting Time: Instant) as Level 10
WT: 0.1 Size: TINY

Race: ALL

Stackable:No

Another PoK merchant
QuoteReply
# Jan 30 2022 at 1:30 PM Rating: Excellent
halfridge
Sage
87 posts
Also sold by Toxicologist Huey in PoK near the small bank, outside, and around the corner from the Parcel merchant.
▲ Page top
Still 2 per vendor
QuoteReply
# Dec 29 2020 at 8:22 PM Rating: Good
Sippin
Sage
3,058 posts
Interesting, this item is still limited to 2 per NPC vendor. And it's LORE. This is an under-appreciated item, considering it's comparable to a druid or wizard self instant evac. 1000pp used to be real money back in the early days but now spending 1kpp to avoid a corpse recovery is a bargain. You can buy both and bank one of them in the shared bank space. Even as a druid I've been in a situation where my instant evac was down and my fade AA didn't work and I'm doubting I'll get to a zone-out before the pack of mobs that's on my tail can nuke or dot me to death. Or they can summon! This is a lifesaver in those situations. Sure, the sting of death has mostly been removed from EQ thanks to modern "care bear" policies but it still takes time to recover and is generally annoying. Ya know?!

Hey, notice how the Dino Island vendor charges 6x as much as everyone else. Price-gouging lizard!



Edited, Dec 29th 2020 9:26pm by Sippin
____________________________
Sippin 115 DRU **** Firiona Vie ****Agnarr
FV: 115 WAR ENC CLE MAG WIZ SHD SHM Master Alchemist ROG Master Tinkerer & Poison-Maker
Master Artisan (300+) * Baker * Brewer * Fletcher * Jeweler * Potter * Researcher * Smith * Tailor
Agnarr: 65 DRU ENC SHD MAG CLE ROG WIZ BRD WAR PAL BST RNG MNK

re: just found merchant that offers this item
QuoteReply
# Apr 19 2005 at 10:33 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591829733697
11 posts
over in rivervale, look for Bimble Babbinsbort. checked to see how charisma will change the cost and this is what i found:

charisma= 190; cost= 1049p 9g 9s 9c
charisma= 140; cost= 1049p 9g 9s 9c
charisma= 115; cost= 1120p
charisma= 90 ; cost= 1244p 4g 4s 4c

hope this helps.
▲ Page top
Great stuff
QuoteReply
# May 22 2004 at 9:40 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591793347392
Scholar
66 posts
These are great. I keep one in a bag slot and make the slot a hot button. If things get hairy. Poof. I'm out. 1049 plat. BTW chrs of 110 is the most you can use on a vendor . anything over that is wasted and does nothing to change the price.

PoP
QuoteReply
# Apr 19 2004 at 10:46 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1671409140606
569 posts
Barbarian potion merchant near the soulbinder / Potion merchant in PoT.

All merchants that sell these also have a limited supply.

Once they are out they are out until patch or killed.

Any merchant that sells invis potions, regen, etc sells these.


▲ Page top
Gate Potions
QuoteReply
# Jul 06 2003 at 12:28 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592257159340
58 posts
Buy gate potions from a shammy, I don't think it's instant but it's cheaper (though still expensive). Combine 3 heliotropes to make it.
▲ Page top
RE: Gate Potions
QuoteReply
# Aug 19 2003 at 7:32 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1649636240637
87 posts
The thing to note here is that this is insta gate. Means that if you get in a bind, you can get out right away. I.e. you do the book portion of your Rogue epic alone and want out right away...(oldish post I know but I had to share, hehe)



-Sir

# Jun 30 2003 at 5:18 AM Rating: Decent

Scholar

These saved my Dwarf Warrior butt a number of times =)
Casting time is instant and can't be interrupted. They are expensive but worth it for a warrior!

lore
QuoteReply
# Feb 16 2003 at 10:39 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593966118024
319 posts
these are lore, cannot stock up on them (
▲ Page top
Clarification
QuoteReply
# Sep 06 2002 at 3:28 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1592253944475
Scholar
50 posts
You will pay at least 1054pp from a vendor for this. This was my price with Ally faction and 183 charisma. If you saw it cheaper, it was not a "Vial of Swirling Smoke". Check the name carefully, and look for the exact words "Effect: Gate".

This item is different from the crafted gate potions because it is instacast, has zero casting time. As soon as you right click it from an inventory slot, you gate instantly. That means you cannot be interrupted.

It only has ONE charge, so once you use it one time, it's gone - poof.
▲ Page top
RE: Clarification
QuoteReply
# May 27 2003 at 8:50 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1595175397247
10 posts
Might want to check your price, again. With an indifferent faction, and a CHA of only 97, I was offered this potion for 1049p,9g,9s,9c. And yes, it WAS the correct Vial. (Effect: Gate).
▲ Page top
RE: Clarification
QuoteReply
# Oct 16 2004 at 9:39 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591787816227
118 posts
I'm not really 100% sure on this, but I've been told the merchants slightly vary their prices based upon the number of a certian item they have in stock. If they have a lot, they'll sell it slightly cheaper. If they're running low they try and shaft you.
▲ Page top

QuoteReply

theres a merchant in shadowhaven that sells these, hes a brewer sells a bunch of potions, all besides this one (including Enduring Breath) cost bout 15p to an indifferent con 37 charisma ogre, and he had these for sale for 135pp. Based off the price everyone else seems to be paying, this seems like quite a deal.

Potions
QuoteReply
# Aug 14 2001 at 11:06 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Im pretty much a master alchemists my gate potions are trivial at 175 skill which is where i cant gain in skill anymore which is quite irratating. only ones i know we can make are innothule swamp, everfrost, and latly field of bone. never heard of making these but i do know they sell gate potions at a vendor in firona vie. costs 1250pp.

P.S any shamans know what can make to raise skill more, and what the hell does the herb agrimony or something that costs 105pp and dont mix with any of the other sold herbs?
▲ Page top
RE: Potions
QuoteReply
# Jul 06 2002 at 2:50 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591777778872
Scholar
78 posts
Ok... firstly... Agrimony mixes with Lucern and Sage Leaf to make a Rejuvenation Lesser potion. Triv is 163 I think...

Secondly... try a large number of the luclin recipes to get over 175, such as:

Titan:
Triv 180, Effect Grow
Maliak Leaf, Tri Fern Leaf

Elixir of Divine Endurance:
Triv > 180, Effect +10 to all saves
Blade Leaf, Beltherium Bark

Greater Mystical Infusion:
Triv > 180, Effect +100 Mana to mana pool...
Yerbhimba, Sickle leaf

Hawk's Eye Tonic:
Triv > 180, Effect archery bonus of some form
Star Reach Clover, Tri Fern Leaf

Elixir of Concentration:
Triv > 180, Effect Regen 2 mana per tick
Yerbhimba, Violet Tri-tube

Elixir of Greater Concentration:
Triv > 180, Effect Regen 3 mana per tick
Duskglow Vine, Violet Tri-tube

Mystical Aptitude:
Triv > 180, Effect Regen 4 mana per tick
Duskglow Vine, Yerhimba

Hope some of them are of interest to you... enjoy getting your stats up, I believe the last one is actually triv at 250ish...

▲ Page top
Re gate
QuoteReply
# Aug 14 2001 at 9:03 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591763204219
4 posts
Im a shaman myself and this isnt a gate potion that we can make and no to my knowledge 255+ in alcehmy isnt possible as 250 is the highest u need about 180-190 for gate potions the areas are FoB and halas but i heard vereant might be adding more destinations i would say how much they make to cost but that wouldnt be fair on all other shms )

But the cast time is 30 seconds
langurin 54 shm

pottin it up
QuoteReply
# Aug 10 2001 at 11:48 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591762923307
10 posts
ive heard these can be made by reeeaaally high level potters, like 255+.. is that true?
▲ Page top
RE: pottin it up
QuoteReply
# Jan 27 2004 at 1:32 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592261278828
30 posts
What Your thinking of is Spirtstones and Faithstone which are clerics and shaman respectfully. They allow them to port home a unlimited number of times
▲ Page top
RE: pottin it up
QuoteReply
# Oct 16 2001 at 1:41 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1592248576252
Sage
178 posts
No, it is not true.

There is a quest (actually a piece of one of the Coldain shawl quests), where with pottery you can make a Thurgadin gate potion. The trivial level for making the Thurgadin gate potion is pottery skill around 122.

The relevant quest is listed on this forum as "Saving Tanik".
▲ Page top
